title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index

items.title: Pressure Index 62/100 (elevated)
items.content_text: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 62/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 16%.
